title: Halloween Storm
description: With a single command, enable ravageous tornadoes, ghasts invasion in the overworld, ghosts (new mob), Herobrine and forbidden forests. Compatible with worldgen datapacks!
body:
**READ INSTRUCTIONS BEFORE DOWNLOADING**

# HALLOWEEN STORM

(old video without particles and mechanics)
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/FhO7AnL_Ea0" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## Halloween season (disabled by default in the datapack)

To enable or disable halloween season, do not uninstall the datapack but run
- **/function halloween:enable_halloween**
- **/function halloween:disable_halloween**

That way, the custom biomes features will remain after the halloween event but won't spread!

### Content of the datapack once /function halloween:enable_halloween is run

- Weather
  - Constant storm
  - Tornadoes
    - Destroy grass block, leaves and thrown items
    - Are frequents once halloween is enabled
    - Keep players stuck rotating around it if they get too close
    - Damage nearby players til they die
- Ghast invasion
  - They spawn in the overworld
- Giant mobs
  - Variants:
    - Giant skeletons
    - Giant zombies
- Herobrine
  - You may see him, but he doesn't do anything except spreading ghosts
- Dead animals
  - Lot of animals are dying, you may easily find meat
